name: fizzy-cli
description: CLI for Fizzy kanban board management

scripts.build:all: bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile fizzy-darwin-arm64 --target=bun-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile fizzy-darwin-x64 --target=bun-darwin-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile fizzy-linux-x64 --target=bun-linux-x64
